message:
feat(indexer): Add streaming indexing with crossbeam channels (Opt 8.2)

Implements streaming indexing architecture with backpressure support:

- Add IndexMessage enum for producer-consumer communication
- Add spawn_connector_producer() for connector scan threads
- Add run_streaming_consumer() for batch ingestion
- Add run_streaming_index() as main entry point
- Add run_batch_index() for original rayon-based fallback
- Feature flag via CASS_STREAMING_INDEX env var (default: enabled)

Benefits:
- Reduced peak memory (batches processed as they arrive)
- Earlier feedback (indexing starts while scanning continues)
- Explicit backpressure via bounded channel (32 batches)

Set CASS_STREAMING_INDEX=0 to disable and use batch mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
